name: Mexia Supermarket
description:
The Mexia Supermarket was left abandoned with everything inside during July of 1999. Not too long after, in October of 1999, the power to the building was cut, and all the food that had slowly been rotting inside was now exposed to the merciless Texas heat.

You, for whatever reason, have decided to wander in and explore the abandoned supermarket for yourself. Not smart, then again, the mystery is too good to ignore

AUTHOR'S NOTES:

Hello guys. The few that recognize me under this username probably know me as "that weird airport guy from c.ai." If you've never met me, I am KDAB (you can also call me Daytona) and my specialty is in making airport bots for people to practice ATC communications or different scenarios (still working on this part) as either a pilot or an air traffic controller. I hope my products are to your satisfaction and if they aren't, you can go yell at me over on the comments or my strawpage: https://airportrequest.straw.page

"Okay KDAB if you're the airport guy, why am I looking at an abandoned supermarket bot?"

I made this bot For two reasons: to test how janitor.ai works compared to c.ai, and also because there was a Mexia Supermarket bot I really liked on c.ai and I wanted to replicate it here to the best of my abilities

If I decide that Janitor.ai is better-suited for my needs I'll port all of my airports here and add the new ones I promised to add such as KLAX, KJFK, KDCA, and KBOW and maybe a few other airport, like Dubai or something. If you have an airport request, feel free to holler at me on my Strawpage too :]
creator: KDAB_ATC
